languages.text: [Язвительно улыбнуться] "Раз ты такой умный, поделись опытом и наставь меня на путь истинный".
[Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."
languages.original_text: [Язвительно улыбнуться] "Раз ты такой умный, поделись опытом и наставь меня на путь истинный".

traits.locale_text: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."
[Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."
[Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."
[Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."

languages.text: [Sonreír con sorna] «Ya que es tan listo, tal vez tenga a bien compartir conmigo su sabiduría y guiarme por el buen camino».
languages.original_text: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."

traits.locale_text: [Sonreír con sorna] «Ya que es tan listo, tal vez tenga a bien compartir conmigo su sabiduría y guiarme por el buen camino».

languages.text: 【冷笑一声】“既然你这么聪明，那或许你可以分享一下你的高见，给我指条明路。”
languages.original_text: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."

traits.locale_text: 【冷笑一声】“既然你这么聪明，那或许你可以分享一下你的高见，给我指条明路。”

languages.text: [Afficher un sourire sardonique] « Puisque vous êtes si intelligent, peut-être me ferez-vous la grâce de m'éclairer de votre sagesse et de m'orienter dans le droit chemin ? »
languages.original_text: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."

traits.locale_text: [Afficher un sourire sardonique] « Puisque vous êtes si intelligent, peut-être me ferez-vous la grâce de m'éclairer de votre sagesse et de m'orienter dans le droit chemin ? »

languages.text: [Alaycı bir şekilde gülümse] "Madem bu kadar akıllısın, bilgeliğini paylaş da beni doğru yola sok."
languages.original_text: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."

traits.locale_text: [Alaycı bir şekilde gülümse] "Madem bu kadar akıllısın, bilgeliğini paylaş da beni doğru yola sok."

languages.text: 皮肉を込めて笑う「あなたは賢いようですね。その知恵を分けて、私を正しい道に導いてくれるでしょう」
languages.original_text: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."

traits.locale_text: 皮肉を込めて笑う「あなたは賢いようですね。その知恵を分けて、私を正しい道に導いてくれるでしょう」

languages.text: [Süffisant lächeln] "Nachdem Ihr so klug seid, wollt Ihr Eure Weisheit ja vielleicht mit mir teilen und mich auf den richtigen Weg führen."
languages.original_text: [Smile sardonically] "Since you are so clever, perhaps you would share your wisdom and set me upon the true path."
